title: Lead Instructional Designer at Sri Chaitanya

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Sri Chaitanya
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Instructional Designer in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
